headline: Built for Scatalyst
subheadline: AI-powered sales infrastructure to turn chaotic sales into predictable revenue for B2B startups across India, US, and Europe

challenges.title: Workforce Reduction
challenges.desc: Scatalyst's 20% employee cut impacts service delivery for clients. This reduction strains team capacity and affects lead generation timelines. Founders must adapt to maintain predictable revenue streams.

challenges.title: Scaling Sales
challenges.desc: Early-stage founders at Scatalyst struggle to scale sales across multiple markets like India and the US. Chaotic sales processes lead to missed opportunities in targeting receptive industries. Building a sales team becomes essential for consistent deal closures.

challenges.title: Lead Conversion
challenges.desc: Scatalyst generates premium leads but faces issues with leads vanishing after demos. This gap in the sales funnel reduces conversion rates for B2B SaaS clients. Founders need strategies to nurture leads into closed deals.

challenges.title: Client Relationships
challenges.desc: As a B2B lead generation firm, Scatalyst must prioritize maintaining relationships amid market changes. Direct communication from account managers like Sonam is key, yet workforce cuts complicate consistent support. Strategic delivery of data-enriched leads ensures client trust.

deliverables.title: Lead Generation AI
deliverables.desc: Builds a system to enrich leads with data insights and integrates with existing CRM for seamless targeting of receptive industries

deliverables.title: Sales Scaling Framework
deliverables.desc: Creates a predictable revenue engine that automates sales processes and integrates with training modules to support team growth

deliverables.title: Deal Closure System
deliverables.desc: Develops tools to nurture leads through the funnel and integrates with demo tracking for better conversion rates

deliverables.title: Relationship Management Platform
deliverables.desc: Establishes a platform for direct client communication and integrates with lead delivery systems to ensure consistent service

engagementSteps.title: Initial Assessment
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review Scatalyst's current sales processes and identify pain points like workforce impacts

engagementSteps.title: System Development
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Design and build AI infrastructure tailored to lead generation and revenue prediction

engagementSteps.title: Implementation
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Integrate the new system and train the team on scaling sales across markets

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It automates lead generation and sales processes for B2B startups.

faqItems.question: How does it address workforce reductions?
faqItems.answer: The system streamlines operations to maintain efficiency with fewer employees.

faqItems.question: Can it integrate with our CRM?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it integrates seamlessly with tools like Salesforce for better data flow.

faqItems.question: What results can we expect?
faqItems.answer: Expect improved lead conversion and predictable revenue based on past B2B successes.

faqItems.question: Is this customizable for our markets?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it's tailored for regions like India, US, and Europe.

faqItems.question: How long is the engagement?
faqItems.answer: Typically three months, with ongoing support as needed.

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Manages CRM for tracking leads and client interactions

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Handles marketing automation and lead nurturing

stackItems.name: Google Analytics
stackItems.role: Provides data insights on sales performance across markets

stackItems.name: Slack
stackItems.role: Facilitates team communication for sales operations

stackItems.name: Zoom
stackItems.role: Supports virtual sales training and demos
